property.name: countryName
property.formula: (SELECT c.Country_Name FROM ROI_CountryLOV c WHERE c.Country_Code = country)

property.name: freeFormFacilityName
property.formula: (SELECT freeform.FreeFormFACILITY FROM cabinet..ROI_FreeFormFacilityLOV freeform WHERE freeform.ROI_FreeFormFacilityLov_Seq = ROI_FreeFormFacilityLov_Seq)

property.name: freeFormFacilityName
property.formula: (SELECT freeform.FreeFormFACILITY FROM cabinet..ROI_FreeFormFacilityLOV freeform WHERE freeform.ROI_FreeFormFacilityLov_Seq = ROI_FreeFormFacilityLov_Seq)

property.name: freeFormFacilityName
property.formula: (SELECT freeform.FreeFormFACILITY FROM cabinet..ROI_FreeFormFacilityLOV freeform WHERE freeform.ROI_FreeFormFacilityLov_Seq = ROI_FreeFormFacilityLov_Seq)

property.name: freeFormFacilityName
property.formula: (SELECT freeform.FreeFormFACILITY FROM cabinet..ROI_FreeFormFacilityLOV freeform WHERE freeform.ROI_FreeFormFacilityLov_Seq = ROI_FreeFormFacilityLov_Seq)

hibernate-mapping.query: SELECT p FROM com.mckesson.eig.roi.supplementary.model.ROISupplementalPatient p WHERE p.id = ?0
SELECT d FROM com.mckesson.eig.roi.supplementary.model.ROISupplementalDocument d WHERE d.patientId = ?0
SELECT a FROM com.mckesson.eig.roi.supplementary.model.ROISupplementalAttachment a WHERE a.patientId = ?0
SELECT d FROM com.mckesson.eig.roi.supplementary.model.ROISupplementarityDocument d WHERE d.mrn = ?0 and d.facility = ?1
SELECT a FROM com.mckesson.eig.roi.supplementary.model.ROISupplementarityAttachment a WHERE a.mrn = ?0 and a.facility = ?1
SELECT p FROM com.mckesson.eig.roi.supplementary.model.ROISupplementalDocument p WHERE p.id = ?0
SELECT p FROM com.mckesson.eig.roi.supplementary.model.ROISupplementalAttachment p WHERE p.id = ?0
SELECT p FROM com.mckesson.eig.roi.supplementary.model.ROISupplementarityDocument p WHERE p.id = ?0
SELECT p FROM com.mckesson.eig.roi.supplementary.model.ROISupplementarityAttachment p WHERE p.id = ?0
hibernate-mapping.sql-query: SELECT count(*) FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalPatients WHERE lastName = :lastName AND firstName = :firstName AND ROI_SupplementalPatients_Seq != :supplementalId

SELECT ROI_SupplementalPatients_Seq id, Created_By_Seq createdBy, Created_Dt createdDt, Modified_Dt modifiedDt, Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, mrn mrn, facility facility, epn epn, lastName lastName, firstName firstName, gender gender, dob dateOfBirth, ssn ssn, address1 address1, address2 address2, address3 address3, city city, zip zip, homephone homephone, workphone workphone, vip vip, coalesce(ROI_FreeFormFacilityLov_Seq, 0) freeformFacilityId, (SELECT fac.FreeFormFACILITY FROM ROI_FreeFormFacilityLOV fac where fac.ROI_FreeFormFacilityLov_Seq = patient.ROI_FreeFormFacilityLov_Seq) freeformFacilityCode FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalPatients patient

SELECT ROI_SupplementalPatients_Seq id, Created_By_Seq createdBy, Created_Dt createdDt, Modified_Dt modifiedDt, Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, mrn mrn, facility facility, epn epn, lastName lastName, firstName firstName, gender gender, dob dateOfBirth, ssn ssn, address1 address1, address2 address2, address3 address3, city city, zip zip, homephone homephone, workphone workphone, vip vip FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalPatients patient

SELECT ROI_SupplementalPatients_Seq id FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalAttachments where encounter like (:encounter + '%') UNION SELECT ROI_SupplementalPatients_Seq id FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalDocuments where encounter like (:encounter + '%')

SELECT patient.ROI_SupplementalPatients_Seq id FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalPatients patient, cabinet..ROI_FreeFormFacilityLOV facility, cabinet..ROI_SupplementalAttachments attachment WHERE patient.ROI_FreeFormFacilityLov_Seq = facility.ROI_FreeFormFacilityLov_Seq AND attachment.ROI_SupplementalPatients_Seq = patient.ROI_SupplementalPatients_Seq AND attachment.encounter like :encounter AND facility.FreeFormFACILITY like :freeformFacility UNION SELECT patient.ROI_SupplementalPatients_Seq id FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalPatients patient, cabinet..ROI_FreeFormFacilityLOV facility, cabinet..ROI_SupplementalDocuments document WHERE patient.ROI_FreeFormFacilityLov_Seq = facility.ROI_FreeFormFacilityLov_Seq AND document.ROI_SupplementalPatients_Seq = patient.ROI_SupplementalPatients_Seq AND document.encounter like :encounter AND facility.FreeFormFACILITY like :freeformFacility

SELECT patient.ROI_SupplementalPatients_Seq id FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalPatients patient, cabinet..ROI_FreeFormFacilityLOV facility WHERE patient.ROI_FreeFormFacilityLov_Seq = facility.ROI_FreeFormFacilityLov_Seq AND facility.FreeFormFACILITY like (:freeformFacility + '%')
SELECT VOLUME, PATH, UUID FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalAttachments where uuid = :uuid UNION SELECT VOLUME, PATH, UUID FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementarityAttachments where uuid = :uuid

SELECT attachment.ROI_SupplementarityAttachments_Seq as id, attachment.Record_Version as recordVersion, attachment.Created_By_Seq as createdBy, attachment.Created_Dt as createdDt, attachment.Modified_By_Seq as modifiedBy, attachment.Modified_Dt as modifiedDt, attachment.volume as volume, attachment.path as path, attachment.UUID as uuid, attachment.fileext as fileext FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementarityAttachments attachment WHERE attachment.ROI_SupplementarityAttachments_Seq in ( :attachmentIds )

SELECT attachment.ROI_SupplementarityAttachments_Seq as id, attachment.Record_Version as recordVersion, attachment.Created_By_Seq as createdBy, attachment.Created_Dt as createdDt, attachment.Modified_By_Seq as modifiedBy, attachment.Modified_Dt as modifiedDt, attachment.volume as volume, attachment.path as path, attachment.UUID as uuid, attachment.fileext as fileext FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementarityAttachments attachment WHERE attachment.mrn = :mrn and attachment.facility = :facility

SELECT attachment.ROI_SupplementarityAttachments_Seq as id, attachment.Record_Version as recordVersion, attachment.Created_By_Seq as createdBy, attachment.Created_Dt as createdDt, attachment.Modified_By_Seq as modifiedBy, attachment.Modified_Dt as modifiedDt, attachment.volume as volume, attachment.path as path, attachment.UUID as uuid, attachment.fileext as fileext FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementarityAttachments attachment WHERE attachment.mrn = :mrn and attachment.encounter = :encounter and attachment.facility = :facility
SELECT ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore rrs WHERE rrs.ROI_SupplementalPatients_Seq = :patientId

SELECT ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore_Seq documentCoreSeq, ROI_SupplementarityDocuments_Seq documentSeq, ROI_Patients_Seq patientSeq, ROI_BillingTier_Seq billingTierId, DATEOFSERVICE dateOfService, encounter encounter, docname docname, subtitle subtitle, MRN mrn, FACILITY facility, DEPARTMENT department, PAGECOUNT pageCount, COMMENT comment, DOCFACILITY docFacility, null freeformfacility, 0 supplementalId, 0 id, Created_Dt createdDt, Created_By_Seq createdBy, Modified_Dt modifiedDt, Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, Record_Version recordVersion FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore WHERE ROI_Patients_Seq = :patientId

SELECT ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore_Seq attachmentCoreSeq, ROI_SupplementarityAttachments_Seq attachmentSeq, ROI_Patients_Seq patientSeq, ROI_BillingTier_Seq billingTierId, DATEOFSERVICE dateOfService, ENCOUNTER encounter, SUBTITLE subtitle, MRN mrn, FACILITY facility, TYPE type, PAGECOUNT pageCount, COMMENT comment, ISDELETED isDeleted, UUID uuid, FILENAME filename, VOLUME volume, PATH path, FILETYPE filetype, FILEEXT fileext, SUBMITTEDBY submittedBy, ATTACHMENTDATE attachmentDate, printable_flag printable, DOCFACILITY docFacility, null freeformfacility, 0 supplementalId, 0 id, Document_Source externalSource, Created_Dt createdDt, Created_By_Seq createdBy, Modified_Dt modifiedDt, Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, Record_Version recordVersion FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore WHERE ROI_Patients_Seq = :patientId

SELECT ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore_Seq attachmentCoreSeq, ROI_SupplementalAttachments_Seq attachmentSeq, ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq patientSeq, ROI_BillingTier_Seq billingTierId, DATEOFSERVICE dateOfService, ENCOUNTER encounter, SUBTITLE subtitle, null mrn, FACILITY facility, TYPE type, PAGECOUNT pageCount, COMMENT comment, ISDELETED isDeleted, UUID uuid, FILENAME filename, VOLUME volume, PATH path, FILETYPE filetype, FILEEXT fileext, SUBMITTEDBY submittedBy, ATTACHMENTDATE attachmentDate, printable_flag printable, DOCFACILITY docFacility, null freeformfacility, 0 supplementalId, 0 id, Document_Source externalSource, Created_Dt createdDt, Created_By_Seq createdBy, Modified_Dt modifiedDt, Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, Record_Version recordVersion FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore WHERE ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = :patientId

SELECT ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore_Seq documentCoreSeq, ROI_SupplementalDocuments_Seq documentSeq, ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq patientSeq, ROI_BillingTier_Seq billingTierId, DATEOFSERVICE dateOfService, encounter encounter, docname docname, subtitle subtitle, null mrn, FACILITY facility, DEPARTMENT department, PAGECOUNT pageCount, COMMENT comment, DOCFACILITY docFacility, null freeformfacility, 0 supplementalId, 0 id, Created_Dt createdDt, Created_By_Seq createdBy, Modified_Dt modifiedDt, Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, Record_Version recordVersion FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore WHERE ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = :patientId
